classes.name: Barbarian
classes.description: A fierce warrior of primitive background who can enter a state of primal fury.

classes.name: Bard
classes.description: An inspiring magician whose power echoes the music of creation itself.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power.

classes.name: Druid
classes.description: A priest of the Old Faith, wielding the powers of nature and adopting animal forms.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, schooled and hardened in the arts of war.

classes.name: Monk
classes.description: A master of martial arts, harnessing the power of the body in pursuit of physical and spiritual perfection.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.description: A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath, channeling divine magic through martial prowess.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: A warrior who uses martial prowess and nature magic to fight the dangers at the edge of civilization.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to accomplish his aims.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic tuned to a specific bloodline or source.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.description: A wielder of the occult powers that are granted by a mysterious patron.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.
